## Runtime.ChocolateLibrary.calculateGanacheForRecipe() method

Calculates ganache characteristics for a recipe object Useful when working with recipes not yet added to the library

**Signature:**

```typescript
calculateGanacheForRecipe(recipe: IRecipe, versionIndex?: number): Result<IGanacheCalculation>;
```
